description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to enemies within range 2 times. The first hit knocks enemies down for [3 sec->1.5sec]. This skill applies Defense Penetration [ (added) 800 higher]. [(removed) reduces their DEF Penetration by 250 for 10 sec]

Removes all harmful effects from all allies and increases their Attack by [???->252*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))], Attack Speed by [300->10%], and Physical Defense by [???->91*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))] for [15 sec->8sec].

Charges forward and deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies 12 times. While casting, the caster is immune to status effects. The final hit freezes enemies for [4 sec->2sec] and increases Physical DMG taken by [ (added) 16%] for [ (added) 10sec].

Every second, Attack increases by [???->16*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))], Status Resistance by [30->10], and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by [1.5%->1%]. This effect stacks up to 20 times. At 20 stacks or more, increases DMG of normal attacks by 100%.

IV.unified: Draws in nearby enemies while casting. [(removed) DMG is increased by 25%]
Status Resistance increases by 30 for each stack. [(removed) ATK Boost is increased by 25%]

dark.unified: ATK increase amount increases by 50%. [(removed) ATK Spd boost of 200 is added]

description.unified: [Smash] reduces the target’s ATK by [20%->25%] and increases the P.DMG they take by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Battle Roar] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases targets' Crit DMG by {0}% for the duration of Skill.
[Vortex] increases DMG by [{0}%->{0}%], and its last hit increases the [All DMG->P.DMG] the target takes by [{0}%->{1}%] for 10 sec.
[Enrage] Changes the max number of stacks to [30->40] and upon gaining 30 stacks, increases own DEF Penetration by {0}.

dark.unified: Recovers HP every second equal to 10% of ATK, and for every 1% HP lost, all damage taken is reduced by [0.6%->0.5%].

description.unified: Max HP increases by {0}%, and Normal Attacks have a 15% chance to deal additional Physical Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power and freeze the target for [2 sec->1 sec].
